did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review that discusses and synthesizes existing literature on the use of AI (such as deep learning and machine learning) in melanoma diagnosis and digital pathology. It does not present original research where the authors developed, trained, or applied an AI model to obtain new study results; rather, it critically appraises and summarizes previous studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
